title: Beautifully Renovated Home in Horizon West – Windermere/Winter Garden
description:
Welcome home to this beautifully renovated property in the highly sought-after Horizon West community, ideally located between Windermere and Winter Garden. With fresh updates throughout, this move-in-ready home offers the perfect blend of modern comfort, convenience, and an unbeatable location.

Step inside to discover brand-new carpet, a beautifully refreshed primary bedroom, fresh interior finishes, and a new washer and dryer, making this home feel like new. The open and inviting floor plan provides plenty of space for relaxing, entertaining, or spending quality time with family.

Beyond the home, you'll enjoy all the incredible amenities that make this neighborhood one of Horizon West's most desirable communities. Residents have access to a beautiful resort-style community pool complete with lounge chairs, a basketball court, a putting green, covered playgrounds, scenic walking and biking trails, and plenty of green space perfect for outdoor activities, family gatherings, or simply relaxing in the Florida sunshine.

Prime Location

Living in Horizon West means you're just minutes from some of Central Florida's best shopping, dining, and entertainment:

Hamlin Town Center featuring Publix, Cinépolis Luxury Cinemas, Starbucks, restaurants, fitness centers, shopping, and everyday conveniences.
Winter Garden Village, offering over 100 retail stores, restaurants, and entertainment options.
Walt Disney World Resort, Flamingo Crossings, and Orange County National Golf Center just a short drive away.
Easy access to State Road 429, Florida's Turnpike, and State Road 408, making commuting throughout Central Florida convenient.
Located near highly rated Orange County schools, healthcare facilities, and numerous community parks.

Whether you're taking an evening stroll through the neighborhood, spending the afternoon at the community pool, shooting hoops on the basketball court, practicing your putting skills, or enjoying nearby restaurants and parks, this home offers a lifestyle that combines comfort, recreation, and convenience.

This beautifully updated home won't last long!

Professionally managed by Atrium Management.

 Please call 407-585-2721 to schedule your private showing today!

title: 4 bed 3.5 Bath | First-Floor Primary Suite + Office + Media Room | Lawn Care & Internet Included
description:
Welcome to this beautifully appointed home in the heart of Lake Nona, offering 4 bedrooms, a dedicated office, a spacious loft, a theater/media room, and the convenience of lawn care and internet included in the rent.

Designed with both comfort and functionality in mind, the open-concept floor plan features a bright and inviting living area that seamlessly connects to the dining space and chef-inspired kitchen. The kitchen is equipped with quartz countertops, a large center island, stainless steel appliances, a designer tile backsplash, and a generous walk-in pantry, making it perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Throughout the home, custom motorized blinds provide both style and convenience.

The primary suite is conveniently located on the first floor, creating a private retreat complete with an exceptionally large walk-in closet and a luxurious ensuite bathroom featuring dual quartz vanities and a glass-enclosed walk-in shower.

Also on the main level is a dedicated office, ideal for working from home, studying, or creating a quiet flex space, along with a well-equipped laundry room offering additional storage.

Upstairs, you'll find three generously sized secondary bedrooms, two full bathrooms, a spacious loft, and a dedicated theater/media room, providing flexible space for movie nights, a game room, playroom, or second living area. The home also offers abundant storage throughout.

Step outside and enjoy your private outdoor living space, where the backyard backs up to a beautiful natural conservation area, providing peaceful views and added privacy. Whether relaxing, grilling, or entertaining, you'll love the tranquil setting and Florida lifestyle.

Additional features include a spacious three-car garage with plenty of room for vehicles, storage, or hobbies.

Ideally located just minutes from Lake Nona Town Center, Medical City, Orlando International Airport, SR-417, top-rated dining, shopping, fitness centers, and entertainment, this home offers the perfect balance of convenience and community living. Residents also enjoy access to the exceptional amenities that make Laureate Park one of Central Florida's most sought-after neighborhoods.

Rent Includes:

Lawn Care
High-Speed Internet

This exceptional home combines modern finishes, flexible living spaces, thoughtful upgrades, and an unbeatable Lake Nona location to create a truly elevated living experience.

$95.00 Application Fee (Non-Refundable) per adult. Pets are negotiable (additional fees apply). This property is professionally managed by Atrium Management. Available July 3rd.

description:
Discover your next home in a sought-after Hammocks community, freshly renovated and move-in ready. Inside, you'll find brand-new granite countertops, gleaming hardwood floors, upgraded cabinetry, and white appliances, plus ceiling fans throughout, a spacious walk-in closet, and a dedicated dining area. description:

title: Up to 2-Months Free, Waived Signing Fees, and Reduced Rates! Experience Tropical Serenity: 3-Bedroom Luxury Villas in Wildwood, FL
description:
Welcome to The Keys at Wildwood, a brand-new residential sanctuary where the laid-back charm of the Florida Keys meets the modern convenience of Central Florida. Located just 2.5 miles from the world-renowned shopping and dining of The Villages, our gated community offers an upscale, maintenance-free lifestyle in the heart of Oxford/Wildwood.

Our expertly designed 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom villas redefine the rental experience. Built with high-quality concrete construction for superior noise reduction and energy efficiency, each home provides a tranquil retreat from the outside world. Inside, you’ll find spacious, single-level floor plans that evoke the true feeling of homeownership without the hassle.

Premium Home Features:

Gourmet Kitchens: Featuring granite countertops, shaker-style cabinetry, and high-end stainless steel appliances.

Smart Home Integration: Every villa is equipped with an Ambient Smart Home package, including a smart hub, keyless entry, doorbell camera, and thermostat controls.

Luxury Finishes: Enjoy 10-foot high ceilings, wide-plank flooring, and oversized walk-in closets.

Convenience Included: Every home features a full-sized washer and dryer, private driveways, and a private patio for enjoying the Florida sunshine.


At The Keys at Wildwood, your backyard is a vacation destination. Whether you’re cooling off in our exquisite resort-style pool, hitting a personal best in the fully-equipped fitness center, or letting your furry friend run free in our dedicated on-site dog park, there is something here for everyone.

Pet-Friendly Living: We welcome your four-legged family members!

Security & Service: Enjoy peace of mind with gated community access and the ultimate convenience of valet trash service.

Prime Location: Positioned perfectly on US-301, you are minutes away from The Villages Regional Hospital, Aldi, Costco, and the vibrant entertainment at Brownwood Paddock Square.


Are you looking for an affordable luxury rental near The Villages? Experience the difference of a community built with you in mind.




 
 
 Rental Terms 
 
 Rent: $1,875 




 Application Fee: $25 



 Available Now

title: 3-Bedroom Home in the Heart of College Park
description:
3-Bedroom Home in the Heart of College Park
Available Now. This updated 3-bedroom, 1-bathroom home offers a clean, modern living space in the established College Park neighborhood of Orlando (32804). Located at 1 E King St, the property provides a balance of contemporary interior upgrades and a central location near Orlando’s primary medical and cultural districts. No pets allowed.

Interior Features & Layout
The home features a functional, open-concept floor plan that connects the main living area with the dining and kitchen spaces. The kitchen has been updated with modern cabinetry and provides ample storage for everyday use.

The primary bedroom is notably oversized, offering a quiet retreat within the home. For ease of maintenance, the interior features updated flooring throughout all bedrooms, with no carpet. The layout is designed to maximize natural light, creating a bright and comfortable environment.

Outdoor Space & Parking
The property includes a fully fenced backyard, offering a private space for outdoor activities or pets. Parking is convenient with a one-car covered driveway and an extended driveway that can accommodate multiple vehicles, a boat, or guest parking.

Location & Community Amenities
Situated in a highly walkable and bikeable area (Bike Score 71+), this home is minutes away from the shops and dining on Edgewater Drive. The location is ideal for professionals and families alike:

Healthcare & Commuting: Located just 0.7 miles from AdventHealth Orlando and providing quick access to I-4 for commutes to Downtown Orlando or Winter Park.

Recreation: Proximity to Lake Ivanhoe Park, the historic Dubsdread Golf Course, and the Loch Haven Park cultural district.

Schools: Zoned for sought-after Orange County public schools, including Princeton Elementary (0.5 miles), and near several respected private institutions.

This move-in-ready home offers a professional and modern living experience in one of Orlando’s most desirable zip codes. Pets are considered with owner approval, additional fees may apply. This property is professionally leased and managed by Atrium Management Company, call today to schedule a private showing (407) 585-2721.

***RESIDENT INTERNET PACKAGE *** All Atrium Property Management residents are automatically enrolled in the High-Speed Internet Package, a required utility. This service, priced at $60 per month, is active on your move-in date. The package provides 1 Gigabit speeds, includes all equipment, has no data caps, and comes with no installation fees. Additional details will be provided at the time of application. ***

Additional charges include: 
$15 monthly filter replacement fee 
$15.50 monthly Renters insurance fee

Our newly remodeled units feature modern upgrades, including stainless-steel appliances, stylish light fixtures, wood and tile flooring, plush new carpeting, granite countertops, spacious walk-in closets, linen closets, large windows, wireless and cable-ready connections.

Step outside to beautifully landscaped walkways, three sparkling swimming pools, a recreational area, on-site laundry facilities, a fully equipped fitness center, and cozy fire pits. Plus, we’re a pet-friendly community—restrictions may apply.

address: 317 E Harwood St, Unit 5, Orlando, FL 32801
title: **Cozy & Affordable Retreat in the Heart of Orlando - 317 E. Hardwood Unit 5**
description:
Looking for a steal of a deal in one of Orlando’s most unbeatable locations? This charming, petite apartment at 317 E. Hardwood Unit 5 is your golden ticket to urban living with a quirky twist! Perfect for those who crave character and convenience, this budget-friendly gem is ready to be your launchpad to the vibrant pulse of the city. 

Let’s talk location—because this is where the magic happens. Nestled just minutes from the electric energy of Downtown Orlando, you’re practically a stone’s throw from the iconic skyline. Imagine strolling to the bustling cafes, trendy boutiques, and world-class entertainment that define the downtown scene. Catch a show at the Dr. Phillips Center for the Performing Arts, sip craft cocktails at a hidden speakeasy, or grab a bite from the endless array of eateries—all without breaking a sweat (or your wallet on parking!). The proximity to Downtown Orlando puts you right in the mix of festivals, farmers’ markets, and that unmistakable city vibe that makes this area a hotspot for locals and visitors alike. 

The apartment itself? Think cozy, vintage charm that’s begging for your personal touch. It’s small, it’s quirky, it’s dated in all the right ways—perfect for minimalists, creatives, or anyone who’d rather spend their money exploring the spectacular surroundings than on fancy finishes. At this price, you’re not just renting a space—you’re securing a front-row seat to one of Florida’s most dynamic neighborhoods. 

Don’t sleep on this rare find—affordable living this close to Downtown Orlando doesn’t come around often. Schedule a viewing today and see how this little hideaway can be your gateway to big-city adventures!

Welcome to Aston Square Luxury Apartments, the newest upscale community designed to elevate your lifestyle. Our cozy one-bedroom luxury apartment offers a perfect blend of modern elegance and comfort, ensuring an unparalleled living experience.

This thoughtfully designed apartment features a resort-style pool, stylish vinyl plank flooring, stainless steel appliances, spacious walk-in custom closets, keyless entry, and an expansive sun deck for outdoor relaxation.

Residents can enjoy top-floor amenities, including a media lounge with a rooftop deck, a dedicated co-working space, package lockers, and electric vehicle charging stations. title: Beautiful 4 Bedroom 2 Bathroom Pool Home in Lake Mary, FL
description:
Located in the heart of Lake Mary, this inviting 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom pool home offers a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor living. From the open foyer, enjoy a thoughtfully designed floor plan that flows effortlessly into the great room. Here, oversized, fully retractable sliding glass doors showcase the sparkling pool and expand the living space for easy entertaining.

The screened-in rear pool patio offers a private retreat for relaxing in the Florida sunshine or hosting friends and family. Just beyond the pool, a fully fenced lawn offers generous space for outdoor activities or simply unwinding in the open air.

Inside, the kitchen is both stylish and functional, featuring granite countertops, a modern tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances, and a dining nook.

The spacious primary suite, a peaceful escape, boasts picture windows overlooking the serene backyard. On the opposite wing of the home, three additional bedrooms share a full bathroom with double sinks and convenient direct access to the pool—perfect after a swim. Two flexible rooms at the front of the home can easily serve as a home office, playroom, dining area, or additional lounging space.

Additional highlights include central A/C for year-round comfort and a two-car garage providing ample storage and parking.

Ideally situated just minutes from Lake Mary’s popular shops and restaurants, this home is zoned for Lake Mary Elementary, Markham Woods Middle, and Lake Mary High. description:
Elevate your lifestyle with extra space and historic charm at Carriage House Apartments. Situated at 916 W. New York Avenue, this recently renovated 2-bedroom apartment offers the perfect solution for residents seeking a home office, a guest room, or a shared living space in the vibrant heart of Downtown DeLand, FL.

Whether you are looking to upgrade your current rental or move closer to the action of Main Street, this unit combines modern updates with an unbeatable location.

Apartment Features & Connectivity
This floor plan is designed to maximize utility and comfort, featuring modern finishes that breathe new life into the space.

Renovated 2-Bedroom Floor Plan: Enjoy the flexibility of two distinct bedrooms. This layout is ideal for roommates, couples needing a dedicated workspace, or anyone who appreciates a bit more room to breathe.

Modern Updates: Experience a fresh, clean aesthetic with updated fixtures and finishes throughout the unit.

Gigabit Internet Access: Stay connected without limits. For a separate monthly charge of $60, residents enjoy 1 Gigabit high-speed internet. This premium connection supports multiple devices simultaneously—perfect for gaming, 4K streaming, or working from home in your new office.

Community Amenities: Residents have exclusive access to the convenient on-site laundry facility.

Experience the Best of DeLand
Carriage House Apartments places you in the center of a walkable, culturally rich community. You are just moments away from the award-winning Main Street DeLand, a hub for dining, shopping, and entertainment.

Walkable Lifestyle: Leave the car behind and explore unique boutiques, local businesses, and a diverse culinary scene featuring everything from wood-fired pizza to international cuisine.

Arts & Entertainment: Take a stroll down the DeLand Mural Walk, enjoy the Sculpture Walk, or see a live show at the historic Athens Theatre.

Outdoor Adventure: DeLand is the ultimate basecamp for nature lovers. You are a short drive from Blue Spring State Park for manatee watching and De Leon Springs State Park, home to the famous Old Sugar Mill pancake house.

Schedule Your Tour Today
Spacious, renovated units in this prime location move quickly. Discover why Carriage House Apartments is the ideal setting for your next home.

description:
Discover the perfect blend of historic charm and modern convenience at Carriage House Apartments. Located at 916 W. New York Avenue, this beautifully renovated 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment offers a premium lifestyle in the heart of Downtown DeLand, FL.

Whether you are a young professional, a student, or simply seeking a walkable lifestyle, this unit is perfectly situated to give you access to the best the city has to offer.

The Downtown DeLand Lifestyle
Living at Carriage House means the vibrant culture of DeLand is right outside your doorstep. You are just a short walk from the award-winning Main Street, famous for its "Old Florida" historic atmosphere and thriving local business scene.
